title: All Items Advancements
description: All Items Advancements is a datapack playable in singleplayer and multiplayer, with or without opponents.
body:
# 💎 All Items Advancements

**All Items Advancements** is a datapack playable in **singleplayer** and **multiplayer**, with or without opponents.
It groups all collectible items, enchantments, and potions in 13 different categories.

![Woods collection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a558dfca9bdbac4e664a3f783f208d1a38e8a8ea.png)
### 📌 The 3 commands you need to know:
- 🏳️ `/trigger aia.[color_name]` > Join a team.
- 🔦 `/trigger aia.night_vision` > Enable/disable night vision for yourself and keep it after death.
- 🎮 `/function aia:start` > Start the game. _(you must be operator)_
### ⚠️ The forbidden command: /kill @e
- Use `/kill @e[type=!marker]`

### 🔒 2 additionnal commands:
- ⏸️ `/function aia:pause` > Pause/unpause the game. _(you must be operator)_
- 💻 `/function aia:admin/commands_list` > List of additional commands.
